patch.value: Breaking-change detector substring-matches non-breaking as breaking (GH #26)

isBreakingItem uses includes('breaking') so 'non-breaking' counts as breaking and --suggest-semver bumps major. Fix: strip negations + word-boundary token + explicit breaking tag. pm-cli PR #108 review.

value.author: codex
value.text: Fixed in generator.ts isBreakingItem: explicit breaking-tag set (breaking/breaking-change/breaking_change), strip NEGATED_BREAKING (non-breaking|not breaking|no breaking) then word-boundary BREAKING_TOKEN /\bbreaking\b/. Unit tests: non-breaking/nonbreaking/not breaking/no breaking → breaking=0; word/tag/flag → breaking=4. Functionally verified: --suggest-semver on 'non-breaking' feature → minor; real 'breaking' → major.
